case_title: DAVID C. BASADA VS. FELIPE MEJIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--RAUL CANAS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURN MAIL - SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD - NOTICE OF JUDGMENT -
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY BASADA, DAVID C. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, FELIPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, FELIPE
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASADA, DAVID C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEJIA, FELIPE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
